creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 146497
poudriere bulk log (9.3R i386)

====>> [01] Finished build of x11/nvidia-driver-173: Success
====>> [01] Finished build of x11/nvidia-driver-304: Success
====>> [01] Finished build of x11/nvidia-driver-96: Success
====>> [01] Finished build of x11/nvidia-driver-71: Success
====>> [01] Finished build of x11/nvidia-driver: Success

bulk build because testport fails on

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: @dirrmtry %%LINUXBASE%%
Error: Orphaned: @unexec rmdir "/compat" >/dev/null 2>&1 || :

while testport -P also on

===> x11/driver (install)
install: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver/work/stage/usr/local/lib/modules/drivers: No such file or directory
*** [install] Error code 71

redports/tinderbox seems to be less strict
